description_long: This is a double-ended open wrench made of metallic material, likely steel, with a simple, utilitarian design. Both ends feature U-shaped open jaws of different sizes, suitable for gripping and turning nuts or bolts. The shaft is straight and flat, with a slight taper toward each end, and the surface appears smooth with a slightly matte metallic sheen. There are no visible brand markings, grip enhancements, or decorative elements, giving it a functional and industrial appearance. The color is predominantly a medium gray, typical of unpainted or lightly finished steel. The wrench is compact and lightweight, suitable for hand use in urban maintenance or repair tasks.
description: A double-ended open wrench with U-shaped jaws and a smooth, metallic gray finish. It has a simple, utilitarian design with no visible markings or grip enhancements.
description_view_0: Front view showing both open jaws and the flat, straight shaft.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, flat profile of the wrench.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying both open jaws and the shaft.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin, flat profile.
